DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Wayne K. Snodgrass & Atty. Owen J. Clements, Tel. No. 1-415-554-4675
appearing for the Petitioner;
Atty. Maureen Onyeagbako, Deputy City Attorney, Tel. No. 1-415-554-4675 appearing for
the Respondent.


RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Respondent/defendant State of California's demurrer to both causes of action in the petition for writ of mandate and complaint for declaratory and injunctive relief filed by petitioner/plaintiff City and County of San Francisco is sustained with ten days leave to amend to give CCSF the opportunity to name a State agency and/or officer as a respondent/defendant. (See word minutes for details)
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
